messages.email_msg2:

Hi Ludivine,

- Nobody trusts their own hiring data enough to act on it
- Gap from "we need X" to first qualified shortlist is still 3–4 weeks
Curious if any of that lands in an RPO setup like yours at Orus. Happy to trade notes over coffee if useful ☕️
Alisher

messages.email_msg2:
Subject: three patterns from 500 TA leaders

Hi Nick,
Been collecting notes from ~500 TA leaders across European scale-ups. Three things keep surfacing for 2026:
- Sourcing is still the #1 time sink, even inside companies built around hiring
- Nobody trusts their own hiring data enough to act on it
- Gap from "we need X" to first qualified shortlist is still 3–4 weeks
Curious if any of that resonates at Instaffo — you're closer to this problem than most. Happy to trade notes over coffee if useful ☕️
Alisher
